name: BB:HostDefinition: Syslog Servers and Senders
notes: Edit this BB to define typical hosts that send or receive syslog. This BB is used in conjunction with the BB:FalsePositive: Syslog Server False Positives Categories and BB:FalsePositve: Syslog Server False Positive Events building blocks.
bb_references: BB:HostDefinition: Syslog Servers and Senders on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: Syslog Ports
when either the source or destination IP is one of the following 127.0.0.2
TD_list: APPLY BB:HostDefinition: Syslog Servers and Senders on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: Syslog Ports
AND when either the source or destination IP is one of the following 127.0.0.2
